name: Task Preprocessing & Flag Inference
description: Sends a task description to Claude Haiku before execution to infer optimal flags (feature mode, auto-decompose, spawn team, apply fix, MCP, extended planning). Applies inferred flags to the AgentTask without overriding user-set values.

Managers/TaskFactory.cs.content:
class TaskFactory : ITaskFactory

  L73: PrepareTaskForFeatureModeStart(AgentTask task) -> void
  L93: GenerateLocalSummary(string description) -> string
  L255: GenerateClaudeMdAsync(string projectPath, bool isGame, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) -> Task<string>

class PreprocessResult
  Header: string
  EnhancedPrompt: string
  ApplyFix: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  Iterations: int
  SentPrompt: string

  L152: FormatActiveToggles(AgentTask task) -> string  // Formats the active toggles for display in task output.

patterns: Non-destructive flag application (only sets unset flags)
dependencies: Writes inferred flags back to AgentTask
